title: Charred Protein Quenched Noodles
description: A high-protein-friendly indulgent polish dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles charred to perfection with a side of cheddar cheese for quenching.

ingredients.name: Protein of choice (e.g. ground beef or chicken)
ingredients.notes: one large burger patty or about 3 ounces of chicken breast/thigh

instructions: Preheat your oven to 425 degrees F.
Slice the cheddar cheese into small cubes and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Place the protein in a hot skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate to rest.
Add vermicelli noodles to another pan and toss with olive oil for about 2-3 minutes or until just tender.
Combine charred cheese cubes and cooked protein in the oven-safe bento box
Top with charred noodle pieces and bake at 400 degrees F for 15 minutes, or until noodles are crispy and cheese is melted.
Let it rest for a couple of minutes before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
